rows.description: Dec: 28 to Francis King his Bill
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (1, 9, 6, 0.5). Visual verification confirmed date is '28' (not '26') and description is 'to Francis King his Bill' (not 'by Bill'). Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini were most accurate for the description text.

rows.description: to ye Dean of St. Ch. Lent for being Venison
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms the amount is 00 02 00. Gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly read the pence as '6'. Claude-haiku's description was completely inaccurate for this row. Gemini-flash provided the most accurate description and amounts.
Consensus on monetary amounts (0, 1, 0, ''). Visual verification confirmed description date is 'Feb. 7' (not 'Fob. 7'). Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini were fully accurate.

Visual verification confirms the amount is 01 00 00. Gemini-flash incorrectly read 0 pounds. Claude-haiku incorrectly read the date as '15'. Gpt-5-mini provided the most accurate amounts and description for this row.

Consensus on monetary amounts (8, 13, 6, ''). Visual verification confirmed description is '16 to Mr Munday his Bill'. Claude-haiku's description used 'Mrs Waundey by Bill', which was less accurate. Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini were accurate.

rows.description: 17 to Mr Weston four years Interest Due at xmas 1743
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 128 00 00. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 12 pounds and had a significantly different description. Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini provided accurate amounts and descriptions.

rows.description: to Mr Weston upon bond by common consent —
rows.notes: Amounts (32, 0, 0, '') are consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this distinct ledger row with the previous entry (row 6). Visual verification confirmed this is a separate row with clear amounts and description.
Full consensus on description and monetary amounts (0, 1, 0, ''). All models were accurate.

rows.description: to Mr Blop one Rheam of Imp. Paper
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 02 12 06. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 0 pounds. For the description, 'Blop' (gpt-5-mini) is a better visual match than 'Blish' (gemini-flash), and 'Rheam' (gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini) is accurate. Selected gpt-5-mini's description.
Visual verification confirms amounts are 16 05 02. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 1 pound. 'Teasler his Bill' is clearly legible. Gpt-5-mini's description and amounts are accurate.

Consensus on monetary amounts (13, 17, 0, ''). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description '13 to ye Book for Candies' is most accurate; 'Candies' is likely an archaic spelling of 'Candles'.
Consensus on monetary amounts (0, 8, 6, ''). Visual verification confirms date is '15' and 'Mr Heritage'. Gemini-flash's description (after removing extra '.') is most accurate.

Consensus on monetary amounts (41, 8, 4, ''). Visual verification confirms description '20 to Mr Evens his Bill'. Gemini-flash provided the most accurate description. Gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku had less accurate names ('Cozens', 'Beens').

rows.description: May 19 to Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot &c. P.K.
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (0, 1, 6, ''). Visual verification confirmed description 'May 19 to Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot &c. P.K.'. Corrected 'Mr Wine' to 'Wine' based on image reading. Gemini-flash was closest.

rows.description: June 12 to Mr Boyles Works for ye Library
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (5, 5, 0, ''). Visual verification confirmed description 'June 12 to Mr Boyles Works for ye Library'. Gpt-5-mini's description was most accurate for spelling 'Boyles'.

rows.description: July 7 to Mr Combes her Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 02 04 00. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 0 pounds. Gemini-flash provided the most accurate amounts and description ('Mr Combes').

rows.description: 10 to Mr Will. Talbot his Plate money
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 08 00 00. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 6 pounds. Gemini-flash provided the most accurate amounts and description ('Mr Will. Talbot his Plate money').

rows.description: Aug 4 to Mr Townsend his Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 44 05 11¾. Claude-haiku incorrectly read the fraction as 0.5 and date as 'Aug 1'. Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini were accurate for amounts and description.

rows.description: 10 to Land tax for ye year 1742. & 1743. 4s. &c.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 14 08 00. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 19 pounds and had a significantly different description. Gemini-flash provided the most accurate amounts and description.

rows.description: 20 brought to Act what was pd Newman for wine

Visual verification confirms this is a distinct entry line with no monetary amounts. Gemini-flash correctly extracted it as a separate row; gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly merged it with the previous entry. Gemini-flash's description is accurate.
Full consensus on description and monetary amounts (0, 1, 0, ''). All models were accurate.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (0, 9, 4, ''). Visual verification confirms date is '28' (not '25') and name is 'Mr Crabb' (not 'Mr Coade'). Gemini-flash provided the most accurate description.

rows.description: Oct. 10 to Mr Horner for Paper Ink &c.

rows.description: to Sedgley for binding two Buttory Books
